title: Waygetter
description: Your favourite Baby Talking Tattletail, now in Minecraft!
body:
![Cover image for the Waygetter mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6f5419085ae61242b78fd85763bc914049250527.webp)

This mod brings the experience of owning your own Tattletail in Minecraft, with a focus on survival.

Based off the indie game [Tattletail](https://store.steampowered.com/app/568090/Tattletail/) _(not officially affiliated)_

![The player holding a Tattletail, showcasing the mod's items/blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bc26e778db82e08e29c94f77952b3273733c4a72_0.webp)

**NOTE: This mod is still in beta, expect things to break and change!**

This mod currently includes:
- A working Mama that hunts you down and attacks if you make too much noise.
- A working Tattletail that talks, eats, and produces too much noise
- A working induction flashlight _(shake to recharge)_
- A brush and a charging station for Tattletail
- Crafting recipes for everything

Planned features:
- Customizable Tattletails _(colors, voices, etc)_.
- Waygetter factory survival structures, making you have to find a Tattletail rather than craft one.
- More in-depth Mama AI, and playable cassette tapes.
- Tasks system, and a command to trigger your own custom tasks if you're making your own horror map. 

See [the wiki](https://github.com/FlooferLand/waygetter-mod/wiki) for crafting recipes and other things

See [the Trello board](https://trello.com/b/jiw0aJHL/waygetter-mod) to see whatever features are being worked on
